title: Dumbkins
description: Makes your pumpkins a bit dumber.
body: Have you ever felt as if minecraft pumpkins looked too... normal? Have you wanted them to be really funny looking, and seem as if they have one common braincell? Well this is the pack for you!![Two Dumbkins on a camping trip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6560f7dfcb3bb6091fa21028e581ace17138072a.png)
